notes: content-script.ts absent; src/content/index.ts is bundled to dist/content-script.js

broad sink search plus line-level inspection found redirect egress bypass, broad loopback extension-origin trust, and unsigned external executable updater; settings update mass assignment, shell injection through yt-dlp args, and cache-key path traversal were suppressed with exact controls

suppressions: Direct Node/Electron primitive exposure not promoted: bootstrap captures and deletes __uspInvoke at lines 51-55, null sandbox/codeGeneration controls are at lines 544-554, and existing tests probe constructor escapes with EvalError.
Undeclared contribution registration is gated by PluginPermissionGate at lines 395-443.
evidence: file.read exact path check at lines 457-465; network.fetch initial-host check at lines 466-475; timer/provider timeout handling at lines 350-374 and 585-597.

suppressions: Host-call abuse beyond transcriptionRuntime.transcribe not promoted: unknown methods throw at lines 272-275 and unavailable runtime throws at lines 276-278.
Worker fault/timeout cleanup exists at lines 170-176, 192-220, and 227-230.
evidence: Utility process bridge validates message object/request ids and maps only fixed contribution/provider methods.

suppressions: Utility-process message validation issue not promoted: Electron MessageEvent.data is unwrapped at lines 23-25, runtime method dispatch is fixed at lines 128-148, and host responses are matched by request id at lines 55-66.
evidence: start payload is normalized before startPluginSandbox at lines 81-104; host-call timeout exists at lines 107-125.

suppressions: No local bypass in the gate itself; candidates come from grant derivation and allowlist sources rather than Set membership.
evidence: constructor stores permissions at lines 6-8 and require throws when permission is absent at lines 10-13.

suppressions: Contribution spoofing not promoted in this file: registry is not exposed to plugin code, unregisterPlugin removes a pluginKey at lines 51-52, and manager-owned registration uses runtime.get*Provider values.
evidence: registry stores providers by pluginKey and returns first registered provider/adapter.
Initializes default loopback endpoint, desktop message handler, endpoint manager, snapshot builder, dashboard bridge, content router, and onConnect dispatch for content/dashboard ports.
Connects to configured WebSocket endpoints, parses raw JSON as ToExtensionMessage, ACKs heartbeat, and forwards non-heartbeat desktop messages to the desktop handler.
Accepts source usp-desktop control-command messages, chooses tab preferred frame via TabRegistry, and posts seek/loop/play/pause/stopLoop commands to the content port.

Validates content messages by type only, ingests page-controlled media payloads, records active frame on video-context, stores per-tab media state, and broadcasts media/page events to desktop connections.
Endpoint storage values are loaded and set through normalizeEndpointList before use; malformed entries are dropped and default endpoints are used only when the storage key is absent.
